description: Chromatic is a cloud service for publishing Storybook builds and running visual, interaction, and accessibility tests on UI components. It also hosts published Storybook content, including remote MCP endpoints for coding agents.
summary: Chromatic exposes a Node-based `chromatic` CLI authenticated by a per-project token (or a personal OAuth token in the Visual Tests addon case), plus published Storybook MCP servers on `/mcp` that authenticate with Chromatic OAuth.
